## 📊 Code Quality
- [ ] `pylint` score ≥ 8.4 (`pylint kosmosic_orbiton.py neuro_link_intel.py`)

- [ ] Follows existing code style and patterns
- [ ] No hardcoded paths or secrets

- [ ] WORKFLOWS.md updated (if CI changes)
